briefing.art: The global art market showed 4% growth in 2025 reaching $59.6 billion. March 2026 is active with events like the Affordable Art Fair (NY) and TEFAF (Maastricht), with a trend toward in-person transactions and storytelling.
briefing.stocks: Indian indices (Sensex/Nifty) are up on March 18, 2026, despite volatility. Global markets remain sensitive to geopolitical tensions and oil prices >$100/barrel, with focus on the US Federal Reserve policy meeting today.
